en: And I said:Hear, you heads of Jacob and rulers of the house of Israel! Is it not for you to know justice?-
zh: 我說： “雅各的首領，你們要聽， 以色列家的官長，你們也要聽； 難道你們不知道公平嗎？

en: you who hate the good and love the evil, who tear the skin from off my people and their flesh from off their bones,
zh: 然而，你們恨惡良善，喜愛邪惡， 從人身上剝皮， 從人骨頭上剔肉。

en: who eat the flesh of my people, and flay their skin from off them, and break their bones in pieces and chop them up like meat in a pot, like flesh in a cauldron.
zh: 你們吃我民的肉， 剝他們的皮， 打斷他們的骨頭， 切成像鍋裡的塊， 像釜中的肉塊。

en: Then they will cry to the LORD, but he will not answer them; he will hide his face from them at that time, because they have made their deeds evil.
zh: 那時，他們要向耶和華呼求， 耶和華卻不應允他們。 到那時，耶和華必掩面不顧他們， 因為他們行了惡事。”

en: Thus says the LORD concerning the prophets who lead my people astray, who cry "Peace" when they have something to eat, but declare war against him who puts nothing into their mouths.
zh: 關於那些使我民走迷路的先知， 耶和華這樣說： “他們的牙齒有所咀嚼的時候， 就大叫‘平安’； 誰不把食物給他們吃， 他們就攻擊那人。”

en: Therefore it shall be night to you, without vision, and darkness to you, without divination. The sun shall go down on the prophets, and the day shall be black over them;
zh: 因此你們只有黑夜，沒有異象， 只有黑暗，沒有默示。 對先知，日頭要下落， 為他們，白日變為黑暗。

en: the seers shall be disgraced, and the diviners put to shame; they shall all cover their lips, for there is no answer from God.
zh: 先見必抱愧， 得默示的人要蒙羞； 他們都必掩著上唇， 因為沒有 神的答覆。

en: But as for me, I am filled with power, with the Spirit of the LORD, and with justice and might, to declare to Jacob his transgression and to Israel his sin.
zh: 至於我，我卻藉著耶和華的靈， 滿有力量、公平和能力， 可以向雅各述說他的過犯， 向以色列指出他的罪惡。

en: Hear this, you heads of the house of Jacob and rulers of the house of Israel, who detest justice and make crooked all that is straight,
zh: 雅各家的首領，你們要聽這個， 以色列家的官長，你們也要聽； 你們厭惡公平， 屈枉正直，

en: who build Zion with blood and Jerusalem with iniquity.
zh: 用人血建錫安， 以罪孽造耶路撒冷。

en: Its heads give judgment for a bribe; its priests teach for a price; its prophets practice divination for money; yet they lean on the LORD and say, "Is not the LORD in the midst of us? No disaster shall come upon us."
zh: 城中的首領為賄賂而審判， 祭司為薪俸而教導， 先知為銀子說默示， 他們竟倚靠耶和華，說： “耶和華不是在我們中間嗎？ 災禍必不會臨到我們身上。”

en: Therefore because of you Zion shall be plowed as a field; Jerusalem shall become a heap of ruins, and the mountain of the house a wooded height.
zh: 所以，為你們的緣故， 錫安必像被耕種的田地， 耶路撒冷必變為亂堆， 這殿的山要成為叢林中的高岡。
